heroDescription: I'm learning React and web development. I'm looking for my first job in IT and creating interesting projects. Passionate about building modern, responsive, and user-friendly web applications using React and JavaScript.
aboutText1: Hello! My name is Meybi, and I am an aspiring Frontend Developer from Ukraine. I am passionate about web development and enjoy creating modern, responsive, and user-friendly applications.
aboutText2: Currently, I am improving my skills in JavaScript, React, Git, and Node.js while working on personal projects to gain practical experience. I am focused on writing clean code, learning best practices, and continuously growing as a developer.
aboutText3: My goal is to start my professional career in IT, contribute to real projects, and eventually become a Full Stack Developer. I enjoy solving problems, learning new technologies, and building applications that make people's lives easier.
exp1: Developed Booking App using React, TypeScript and Vite.
exp2: Built Task Manager Pro with responsive design and modern UI.
exp3: Created and deployed multiple projects using Vercel.
exp4: Worked with Git, GitHub, React, TypeScript and JavaScript.
exp5: Focused on improving frontend development skills through hands-on projects.
taskManagerDesc: Task management application built with React. Users can create, edit and organize tasks.
hiLegalDesc: A responsive website for a law firm, showcasing their services and team members.
bookingDesc: Web application for booking services with a user-friendly interface built using React.
contactText: Feel free to contact me through the links below.
